parsed.production_notes: The video uses a split-screen format combining a 3D AI-generated avatar on the top half and a human-recorded actor on the bottom half. The avatar exhibits typical 3D animation rendering and lip-syncing, while the human footage is standard live-action.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female with a fair complexion, long wavy black hair, and large brown eyes. Features are smooth and stylized typical of modern 3D avatars.
characters.wardrobe: Wearing a solid blue blazer over a plain white top.

characters.appearance: Young adult human female with a brown complexion and long, dark, wavy hair. Natural facial features with minimal makeup.
characters.wardrobe: Wearing a black t-shirt featuring a white 'STAR WARS' logo and red Japanese text below it.
characters.demeanor: Casual, attentive, and slightly hesitant initially before becoming interested.

scenes.setting: Top: Abstract blue and purple geometric background. Bottom: Plain room with white wainscoting and a grey sofa.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, a 3D animated female avatar, is framed in a medium close-up. She has long wavy black hair and wears a blue blazer over a white top. The background consists of abstract blue and purple geometric shapes. The lighting is even and bright, typical of 3D rendering. She looks directly at the camera while speaking.

Character B, a young woman, is framed in a medium close-up. She has long dark wavy hair and wears a black t-shirt with a 'STAR WARS' logo. She sits on a grey textured sofa against a plain wall with white wainscoting. The lighting is natural and soft. She looks directly at the camera while speaking.

scenes.visual_description: A continuous split-screen layout with Character A on top and Character B on the bottom. Both characters are speaking directly to the camera, simulating a two-way conversation. Subtitles appear over their respective panels.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: I want to learn English... எனக்கு நாளைக்கு ஒரு இன்டர்வியூ இருக்கு. [I have an interview tomorrow.]
Character A says: உங்களுக்கு English speaking கத்துக்கணுமா? [Do you want to learn English speaking?]
Character B says: ஆமா... ஆனா உங்களால தமிழ்ல பேச முடியுமா? [Yes... but can you speak in Tamil?]
Character A says: நிச்சயமா. உங்களுக்கு இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துக்கணுமா? [Certainly. Do you want to learn English?]
Character B says: ஆமா. நான் இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துக்கணும்னு ஆசைப்படுறேன். ஆனா என்கிட்ட அதிக நேரமும் இல்ல, பணமும் இல்ல. அதுவும் நான் Tamil medium-ல படிச்சேன். [Yes. I desire to learn English. But I don't have much time, nor money. Also, I studied in Tamil medium.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
I want to learn English...
எனக்கு நாளைக்கு ஒரு இன்டர்வியூ இருக்கு. (I have an interview tomorrow.)
உங்களுக்கு English speaking கத்துக்கணுமா? (Do you want to learn English speaking?)
ஆமா... ஆனா உங்களால தமிழ்ல பேச முடியுமா? (Yes... but can you speak in Tamil?)
நிச்சயமா. உங்களுக்கு இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துக்கணுமா? (Certainly. Do you want to learn English?)
ஆமா. நான் இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துக்கறேன்னு ஆசைப்படுறேன் (Yes. I desire to learn English)
ஆனா என்கிட்ட அதிக நேரமும் இல்ல (But I don't have much time)
பணமும் இல்ல (nor money)
அதுவும் நான் Tamil medium-ல படிச்சேன் (Also, I studied in Tamil medium)

scenes.visual_description: The same split-screen layout continues. As Character A speaks about the time commitment, a large graphic of an analog clock briefly appears over the center of the screen, blurring the background slightly.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: MySivi try பண்ணுங்க. தினமும் வெறும் 10-15 நிமிஷம் என்கூட English practice பண்ணுங்க. ஒரே மாசத்துல நீங்க சூப்பரா இங்கிலீஷ் பேசுவீங்க. [Try MySivi. Practice English with me for just 10-15 minutes daily. In just one month, you will speak English superbly.]
Character B says: இதுல teacher யார் இருப்பாங்க? [Who will be the teacher in this?]
scenes.on_screen_text:
MySivi try பண்ணுங்க (Try MySivi)
தினமும் வெறும் 10-15 நிமிஷம் (Daily just 10-15 minutes)
10 mins
என்கூட English practice பண்ணுங்க (Practice English with me)
ஒரே மாசத்துல நீங்க சூப்பரா இங்கிலீஷ் பேசுவீங்க. (In just one month, you will speak English superbly.)
இதுல teacher யார் இருப்பாங்க? (Who will be the teacher in this?)

scenes.visual_description: The continuous split-screen layout remains unchanged. Character A explains the features of the app while Character B listens and responds positively.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: என்னை மாதிரி AI teachers. Step-by-step-ஆ இங்கிலீஷ் பேச கத்துக்கொடுப்பாங்க. தப்புகளை உடனே correct பண்ணுவாங்க. முக்கியமா உங்களை பார்த்து யாரும் சிரிக்க மாட்டாங்க. [AI teachers like me. They will teach you to speak English step-by-step. They will correct mistakes immediately. Importantly, no one will laugh at you.]
Character B says: ம்ம் கேக்க நல்லா இருக்கே. [Hmm, sounds good to hear.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
என்னை மாதிரி AI teachers (AI teachers like me)
Step-by-step-ஆ இங்கிலீஷ் பேச கத்துக்கொடுப்பாங்க. (They will teach you to speak English step-by-step.)
தப்புகளை உடனே correct பண்ணுவாங்க. (They will correct mistakes immediately.)
முக்கியமா உங்களை பார்த்து யாரும் சிரிக்க மாட்டாங்க. (Importantly, no one will laugh at you.)
ம்ம் கேக்க நல்லா இருக்கே. (Hmm, sounds good to hear.)

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen layout continues. Several promotional graphics overlay the video in sequence: a large '50 LAKHS' text graphic, a dark pricing card detailing a trial offer, and finally a mock app store installation prompt.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: இன்னைக்கே MySivi app download பண்ணுங்க. 50 லட்சத்துக்கும் அதிகமானவங்க தினமும் இங்க English practice பண்றாங்க. வெறும் ₹1 trial-ல ஆரம்பிச்சு உங்க இங்கிலீஷை next level-க்கு கொண்டு போங்க. [Download the MySivi app today. More than 50 lakh people practice English here daily. Start with just a ₹1 trial and take your English to the next level.]
Character B says: இப்பவே MySivi app-அ download பண்றேன். [I am downloading the MySivi app right now.]
